title: Baby Coat Hangers Small Clothes Hangers First Steps Pack of 16 White
features: Pack of 16 White/Pale Blue Baby Clothes Hangers
BABY CLOTHES HANGERS: This pack of clothes hangers are made specifically for baby & toddler clothes. Their size makes them perfect for hanging smaller clothes in small wardrobes.

ALL PURPOSE: The clothes hangers are great for hanging all sorts of toddler and baby clothes such as tops, dresses, skirts, dungarees, shorts, trousers, baby grows and vests. The hangers each have a trouser bar, skirt hooks and notches for ease of hanging.

HIGH QUALITY: Made from high quality plastic, the hangers are finished with a smooth surface. The design of the hangers are thin enough to be space-saving but also strong enough to hold clothes and sustain everyday use.
SIZE: Approximate measurements: 22cm x 12cm x 0.4cm. Care and Usage instructions included
